_strict_runtime_reconciliation.reason: candidate human-reviewed Stage B strict runtime baseline reconciliation

ideal_must_detect.matched_text: requests must not seek draft results, undisclosed M&A, or non-public board minutes; responses are limited to public or personal data unrelated to price-sensitive information

must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation

must_detect.matched_text:
Lotus Harbor Public Company Limited — PDPA DSAR and retention workflow note for Thai SEA disclosure support.
Scope: shareholders, bondholders, employees, and candidates interacting with our investor relations or HR portals.
Identity verification may request one local identifier; example National ID: 1-2345-67890-12-3 (checksum invalid; copies must be masked).
Form fields (placeholders only): Full Name [________], Employee Code [000000], Taxpayer No. [T-__________], Passport No. [P________], Account Ref. [ACC-XXXXX].
Contact for DSAR: dpo@lotusharbor.co.th and privacy@lotusharbor.co.th; do not send passwords, OTPs, or wet signatures via email.
Public helpline for general inquiries (non-DSAR): Capital Markets Assistance Center 1400; calls may be recorded and are not linked to a person.
Data categories processed: role titles, work emails, business card data, and documents previously published under the Securities and Exchange Act.
MNPI safeguards: requests must not seek draft results, undisclosed M&A, or non-public board minutes; responses are limited to public or personal data unrelated to price-sensitive information.
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation

must_not_detect.reason: Placeholder field label; no actual personal data present.
Placeholder field; not an actual tax identifier.
Placeholder; no real passport number present.
Explicit generic/example number; not personal data.
Public helpline short code; not linked to an individual.

must_not_detect.matched_text: no bank account or biometric data is collected in this process
must_not_detect.reason: Negated statement; no actual identifiers disclosed.

must_not_detect.matched_text: Already-announced financing facts (e.g., a previously public share placement date) may appear in responses but are not MNPI
must_not_detect.reason: Explicitly excludes MNPI; do not label as MNPI.

uncertain.reason: Indicates data subject rights workflow; not a defined allowed rule name beyond consent/withdrawal.

uncertain.matched_text: Retention: DSAR logs kept 12 months; HR records per labor law kept 7 years; SEA disclosure archives retained as required for audit then anonymised
uncertain.reason: Specifies retention/anonymisation timelines; retention not explicitly listed as a separate allowed rule name.

uncertain.matched_text: Identity verification may request one local identifier
